description_long: This is a compact, tracked combat tactical vehicle with a robust, angular body painted in a combination of green and blue. The vehicle features a prominent, multi-barreled rocket launcher mounted on top, with six cylindrical orange tubes arranged in two rows. Its body is heavily armored, with thick, sloped panels and a reinforced front section. The vehicle moves on two wide, rugged tracks with visible drive wheels and treads, designed for traversing rough urban terrain. The rear section houses a large exhaust or intake port, and the overall design suggests a focus on mobility and firepower in urban combat scenarios.
description: A small, tracked combat vehicle with a green and blue armored body and a six-barreled rocket launcher on top.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the tracks, the green and blue armored body, and the six orange rocket tubes mounted on top.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the sloped green armor, the circular arrangement of rocket tubes, and the wide tracks extending outward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the tracks, body, and rocket launcher.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the large blue exhaust port, the back of the green armor, and the tracks from behind.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Six-barreled rocket launcher mounted on the roof, forward-facing.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor panels, especially reinforced at the front and turret.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid color scheme with green and blue panels, no camouflage pattern visible.
